title: 500-role ranked search universe (250 federal + 250 private)
public_claim: 500-role ranked search universe (250 federal + 250 private) is a preserved project packet for this packet converts the user's CIA DO / HUMINT / CI / Russia-Eurasia career goal into a ranked search universe: 250 federal/public purposes and 250 private-sector roles scored against alignment to DO, clearance value, HUMINT/CI tradecraft yield, and suitability for a 34-year-old Georgetown Applied.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
